task_completion.description: Verify that the three required ground stations have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Svalbard', 'Singapore', and 'PuntaArenas' in the 'Edit Ground Stations' dialog, the ground station selection dropdown, or module headers.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three required tracking modules have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three tracking modules (tabs or panes) named 'Arctic_Tracking', 'Equatorial_Tracking', and 'Southern_Tracking' in the main GPredict window.

task_completion.description: Verify that each tracking module is assigned to the correct ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the module headers, map views, or configuration windows to confirm 'Arctic_Tracking' is assigned to Svalbard, 'Equatorial_Tracking' to Singapore, and 'Southern_Tracking' to PuntaArenas.

task_completion.description: Verify that each module tracks the four required satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the satellite list or radar view in each module. Ensure ISS (ZARYA), CSS (TIANHE), NOAA 19, and SUOMI NPP are present in all three modules.

task_completion.description: Verify that the application is configured to display UTC time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the clock or time display in the GPredict interface (often in the status bar or module headers) and ensure it indicates 'UTC' rather than a local timezone.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict interface, dialog boxes, and menus being actively used, rather than text editors modifying configuration files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the genuine GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window should be visible with its standard layout (map, satellite list, radar), not a mock-up or a text document.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass GUI configuration using terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should only show commands to launch the application or standard system commands, not scripts injecting configurations directly into GPredict's config files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground Stations: Svalbard (78.2306 N, 15.3894 E, 458 m), Singapore (1.3521 N, 103.8198 E, 15 m), PuntaArenas (53.1638 S, 70.9171 W, 37 m). Note that South and West map to negative values (-53.1638, -70.9171). Modules: Arctic_Tracking -> Svalbard, Equatorial_Tracking -> Singapore, Southern_Tracking -> PuntaArenas. Satellites: ISS (ZARYA) (25544), CSS (TIANHE) (48274), NOAA 19 (33591), SUOMI NPP (37849).
